title: Ninth judicial district
doc_html:
§621.9.  Ninth judicial district

The Ninth Judicial District Court shall have seven judges.

Acts 1997, No. 127, §1, eff. June 13, 1997.
doc_text:
§621.9.  Ninth judicial district
The Ninth Judicial District Court shall have seven judges.
Acts 1997, No. 127, §1, eff. June 13, 1997.
